reviews.comment: Worst coffee with a long service time. Stop wasting a great business spot.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
We’ve taken note of your feedback and have shared it with our team as we review both the coffee experience and service timelines. Delivering consistently good coffee with smooth service is something we’re continuously working to improve.

If you’re open to it, we’d value the chance to understand more about your visit. Please feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
